entries.label: app-screenshot-dark
entries.note: Drift-watch refresh 2026-07-13: re-pulled primary dark-mode shell screenshot (no-auth rung). Byte size grew (128KB -> 1.2MB) due to higher native resolution served by CDN, not a content change.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.

entries.label: app-screenshot-light
entries.note: Drift-watch refresh 2026-07-13: re-pulled primary light-mode shell screenshot (no-auth rung; chatgpt.com/codex requires user session, not available). Content matches 2026-06-18 capture (same UI text/layout: 'Redesign app modern UI' thread, GPT-5.4 selector, 33 previous messages, Review pane diff) — only served at higher native resolution (3600x2026 vs 1920x1081). No visual drift detected.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.
